title: chore(deps): update storybook monorepo to v5.1.10
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [@storybook/addon-actions](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook) | devDependencies | patch | [`5.1.9` -> `5.1.10`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@storybook%2faddon-actions/5.1.9/5.1.10) |
| [@storybook/html](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook) | devDependencies | patch | [`5.1.9` -> `5.1.10`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@storybook%2fhtml/5.1.9/5.1.10) |
| [@storybook/theming](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook) | devDependencies | patch | [`5.1.9` -> `5.1.10`](https://renovatebot.com/diffs/npm/@storybook%2ftheming/5.1.9/5.1.10) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>storybookjs/storybook</summary>

### [`v5.1.10`](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​5110-July-31-2019)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/compare/v5.1.9...v5.1.10)

##### Breaking Changes

-   Core: Remove project root `babel.config.js` loading ([#​7573](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7573))

##### Bug Fixes

-   Addon-info: change stylesheetBase info height from 110vh to 100vh ([#​7141](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7141))
-   React-native: Fix react native server ([#​7187](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7187))
-   Addon-centered/contexts: Move optionalDependencies to peerDependencies ([#​7315](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7315))
-   Addon-notes/info: Fix indenting on markdown code blocks ([#​7158](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7158))
-   Addon-actions: fix serialization performance ([#​7256](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7256))
-   Addon-notes: Fix dark theming bug ([#​7623](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7623))
-   CLI: Fix usage information ([#​7627](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7627))
-   Addon-centered: Fix component disappearing on zoom ([#​7400](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7400))
-   Addon-analytics: Fix API signature ([#​7410](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7410))
-   UI: Fix Sidebar input refresh on 'Enter' ([#​7342](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7342))
-   Addon-knobs: Prevent rerender when a button callback returns false. ([#​7197](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7197))
-   Core: Keep story data and legacy data in sync ([#​7319](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7319))
-   CLI: Move the free port logic so that loadOptions don't override it ([#​7237](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7237))
-   Addon-backgrounds: Fix unstretched preview background wrapper ([#​7173](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7173))

##### Maintenance

-   Build: delete tests & snapshots from dist ([#​7358](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7358))

##### Dependency Upgrades

-   CLI: replaced merge-dirs dependency by fs-extra ([#​7100](https://togithub.com/storybookjs/storybook/pull/7100))

</details>
